system.description: A Space Marine is a master of the tools of warfare, but through long practice and affinity he may reach a level of mastery with a particular type of weapon so that it becomes a tool of perfect destruction. When this Talent is taken, a type and class of weapons must be specified, such as bolt (pistols) or melee (chain). This Talent may be taken multiple times for different types and classes of weapons. When using the specified type of weapon, the Battle-Brother never suffers a penalty greater than –30 when using the weapon.
